creator: rabe@uugrn.org
text:
shells/zsh/make // zsh-4.3.6. does not build

gawk -f ./curses_keys.awk /usr/include/curses.h /dev/null >curses_keys.h
cc -c -I. -I/usr/local/include -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -DMODULE -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -fPIC -o curses..o curses.c
In file included from ../zshcurses.h:1,
                 from curses.c:45:
/usr/include/ncurses.h:289: error: conflicting types for 'wchar_t'
/usr/include/stddef.h:61: error: previous declaration of 'wchar_t' was here
/usr/include/ncurses.h:292: error: conflicting types for 'wint_t'
/usr/include/wchar.h:94: error: previous declaration of 'wint_t' was here
*** Error code 1

Stop in /var/tmp/usr/ports/shells/zsh/work/zsh-4.3.6/Src/Modules.
*** Error code 1

http://shell.uugrn.org/FreeBSD/bugreports/ports/shells/zsh/make_zsh-4.3.6.out

Fix: 

no idea.
How-To-Repeat: 	$ cd usr/ports/shells/zsh
	$ make disctclean
	$ make
